prompt: My app icon looks great in default mode but I'm having trouble with dark mode — my bright orange element basically disappears against the dark background. Also, in tinted mode everything just looks like a grey blob. How do I fix both of these in Icon Composer?
assertions: Explains how to add a per-appearance Fill variant for the Dark mode in Icon Composer (e.g., selecting Dark in canvas, using Vary for Dark or equivalent per-appearance control)
Suggests a specific colour strategy for the orange in dark mode (e.g., use a brighter or more visible version of orange, or a different colour that reads on dark)
Explains that the primary/most recognisable element should be set to white in Mono mode
Explains mapping secondary elements to distinct grey tones (not all the same grey) for contrast hierarchy in mono
Mentions the Mono Options dialog (or equivalent) for previewing tint colours
